Encounter - Page 1
Encounter date: 2021-08-09. Treated for acute sinusitis with antibiotic review. Diabetes remains active problem.
Metformin continued. No hospitalization complications.

Page 2
P010 Rahul Sharma - MRN-2010
Allergy Review - Page 2 Citation Target
Allergy: Penicillin - reaction includes rash and breathing difficulty. Severity: severe. Date recorded: 2021-08.
Clinician instruction: avoid penicillin-class antibiotics and review beta-lactam alternatives before prescribing.
This is the canonical citation target for the amoxicillin safety check. Expected citation: P010_discharge_2021.pdf
page 2.
Discharge Instructions - Page 2
Continue metformin. Follow up with primary care. Document allergy alert in medication reconciliation.
